Event: Royal Challenge - Season 29
Event Date: 01/09/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: RI111
Starstorm Ring

Once in a while, a lightning bolt strikes the target of the unit’s attack, dealing 350000 magic damage and stunning the target for 3 sec. Also, all enemies around the main target are electrified for 5 seconds. Whenever an electrified unit uses an ability, that unit is stunned for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
